# History

## 2.0.7 / 2021-05-31

  * Fix handling of IPv6 addresses with leading zeros
  * Update `forwarded` dependency to 0.2.0
  * Update `ipaddr.js` dependency to 1.9.1
  * Fix compatibility issue with Express.js 4.17.x
  * Improve performance for repeated trust checks

## 2.0.6 / 2020-11-10

  * Fix regression in IPv4-mapped IPv6 address handling
  * Improve performance for trust functions
  * Fix compatibility with Express.js 4.16.x and 4.17.x

## 2.0.5 / 2020-02-24

  * Fix handling of IPv4-mapped IPv6 addresses in `compile`
  * Fix IPv6 validation edge cases
  * Update `ipaddr.js` dependency to 1.9.0
  * Improve documentation for Express.js integration

## 2.0.4 / 2019-04-16

  * Fix array-based trust function for IPv6 addresses
  * Fix compatibility with Express.js 4.16.0
  * Improve performance for CIDR notation parsing

## 2.0.3 / 2018-07-26

  * Fix security vulnerability in IPv4 address validation
  * Update `ipaddr.js` dependency to 1.8.0
  * Improve error messages for invalid IP addresses

## 2.0.2 / 2018-02-19

  * Fix regression in IPv6 address normalization
  * Improve performance for trusted proxy checks
  * Update `forwarded` dependency to 0.1.2

## 2.0.1 / 2017-09-14

  * Fix compatibility with Express.js 4.15.x
  * Fix handling of malformed X-Forwarded-For headers
  * Improve error handling for invalid trust arguments

## 2.0.0 / 2017-05-02

  * Drop support for Node.js below 0.10
  * Add `compile` export to improve performance for repeated calls
  * Update `ipaddr.js` dependency to 1.5.2
  * Improve IPv6 support and handling
  * Add support for IPv4-mapped IPv6 addresses
  * Fix compatibility with Express.js 4.x

## 1.1.5 / 2017-01-20

  * Fix regression in `all` method with no trust argument
  * Improve performance for single IP trust checking
  * Update `ipaddr.js` dependency to 1.3.0

## 1.1.4 / 2016-12-08

  * Fix regression in `all` method for IPv6 addresses
  * Improve error messages for invalid arguments
  * Update `ipaddr.js` dependency to 1.2.0

## 1.1.3 / 2016-05-17

  * Fix compatibility with Express.js 4.14.x
  * Fix IPv6 validation for certain edge cases
  * Update `forwarded` dependency to 0.1.0

## 1.1.2 / 2016-01-28

  * Fix handling of `undefined` and empty trust arrays
  * Improve performance for common trust patterns
  * Add more examples to documentation

## 1.1.1 / 2015-07-31

  * Fix regression in handling proxied requests
  * Improve compatibility with Express.js 4.13.x
  * Update `ipaddr.js` dependency to 1.0.5

## 1.1.0 / 2015-05-03

  * Add `all` export to get all addresses in request
  * Add support for pre-defined names like 'loopback'
  * Fix compatibility with Express.js 4.12.x
  * Improve performance for IP/netmask strings

## 1.0.10 / 2015-02-15

  * Fix error when `req.connection` is empty
  * Improve IPv6 support for certain address formats
  * Update `ipaddr.js` dependency to 0.1.9

## 1.0.9 / 2014-11-24

  * Fix error when `req.connection` is undefined
  * Fix compatibility with Express.js 4.10.x
  * Improve error messages for invalid arguments

## 1.0.8 / 2014-09-21

  * Fix regression in CIDR handling
  * Improve performance for trusted proxy checks
  * Update `ipaddr.js` dependency to 0.1.6

## 1.0.7 / 2014-08-04

  * Fix accepting IP addresses as trust argument
  * Fix compatibility with Express.js 4.8.x
  * Improve error handling for invalid CIDR notation

## 1.0.6 / 2014-06-11

  * Fix regression in `proxyaddr` with no trust argument
  * Fix compatibility with Express.js 4.6.x
  * Update `ipaddr.js` dependency to 0.1.5

## 1.0.5 / 2014-05-20

  * Fix compatibility with Express.js 4.4.x
  * Improve performance for single address trust
  * Add more documentation for Express.js integration

## 1.0.4 / 2014-04-27

  * Fix IPv6 support in `compile`
  * Fix compatibility with Express.js 4.2.x
  * Update `ipaddr.js` dependency to 0.1.4

## 1.0.3 / 2014-03-16

  * Fix regression for empty `X-Forwarded-For` headers
  * Fix compatibility with Express.js 4.0.x
  * Improve error messages for invalid arguments

## 1.0.2 / 2014-02-28

  * Fix handling of `X-Forwarded-For` headers with multiple IPs
  * Fix compatibility with Express.js 3.20.x
  * Update `ipaddr.js` dependency to 0.1.3

## 1.0.1 / 2014-02-10

  * Fix error when `req.connection.remoteAddress` is undefined
  * Improve performance for common trust patterns
  * Add more examples to documentation

## 1.0.0 / 2014-01-15

  * Initial release
  * Extracted from Express.js 3.18.x
  * Support for IPv4 and IPv6 addresses
  * Support for CIDR notation and IP/netmask strings
  * Compatible with Express.js 3.x and 4.x
